label: Adding Instances to a Virtual-Firewall-Based Network

link.description: Virtual firewall instances can be easily created and deployed within the Virtual Firewall Module. These instances utilize specialized Linux-based operating system images, which are made available as part of a dedicated OS Collection tailored for firewall and security operations. Users can initiate instance creation through the standard workflow, with additional options and controls specifically designed for the Virtual Firewall network. During this process, users can select the appropriate OS image, configure network settings, and define firewall roles, ensuring that each instance is properly aligned with the overall security architecture.
